Custom Clothing Manufacturer for Australian Brands

MOQ 50 pieces·DDP shipping to Australia·Quotes in 24h
Home › Custom Clothing Manufacturer for Australian Brands

Why Australian Brands Manufacture with FABRIOZA

  • 50-piece MOQ: launch or test a style without committing to a container. Most factories serving Australia demand 300–500 pieces per design.
  • Factory-direct pricing: we are the factory in Sialkot, Pakistan — no trading company margin. Typical savings vs Australian domestic production run 45–60%.
  • Verified standards: ISO 9001 quality management, BSCI social compliance, OEKO-TEX fabric safety, WRAP certification — the audit trail Australian retailers ask for.
  • English-first communication with AU-afternoon working-hours overlap, quotes inside 24 hours, and one point of contact from sample to delivery.

Shipping & Import to Australia

OptionTransitBest for
DHL/FedEx express (DDP)4–6 business daysDrops and restocks
Air freight (DDP)7–10 daysMid-size orders
Sea freight (Sydney/Melbourne)25–32 daysLarge inventory

Australia is one of the friendliest import markets: 5% apparel duty plus 10% GST, both included in our DDP quotes. Australian brands come to us mostly for performance product - rugby, cricket, netball and AFL-style uniforms, sublimated club kits that survive the sun, and gym wear built for year-round training culture.

Who This Is For

Activewear and swim-adjacent startups, sports clubs and schools ordering team kits, surf/street labels wanting heavyweight tees, and established brands diversifying supply away from China (see our Alibaba vs direct factory comparison).

What We Manufacture for Australian Brands

Team uniforms & sportswear (16 categories), streetwear (heavyweight tees, oversized hoodies, cargo), women's fashion, blazers & suits, medical scrubs, kidswear, plus size, menswear, intimate apparel and sustainable/eco garments — all fully private-labeled under your brand. See everything we make.

How It Works

  1. Send your design — tech pack, sketch or reference image. Free mockup within 24–48 hours.
  2. Approve your sample — produced in 5–7 days, shipped to your door in Australia.
  3. Bulk production — 2–4 weeks with 4-stage QC (fabric inspection, in-line checks, AQL 2.5 sampling, photo documentation).
  4. DDP delivery — we handle export, freight and Australian duty & GST; you receive sealed cartons ready to sell.

FAQ: Manufacturing for Australian Brands

Do you handle Australian import duty and GST?

Yes - DDP includes the 5% apparel duty and 10% GST with all customs paperwork handled. Orders under AUD 1,000 are duty-free, which suits sample shipments.

How long is shipping to Australia?

Express courier 4-6 business days; total from approved sample to delivery in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane or Perth is typically 3.5-5 weeks.

Can you make sublimated sports uniforms?

Yes - all-over sublimation is a core specialty: rugby, soccer, cricket, netball, basketball and touch football kits with colors that never crack or fade.

What is the minimum order?

50 pieces per style (20 for team uniform categories). Club orders can mix sizes freely within a style.

Is the time difference a problem?

No - Pakistan is only 5-6 hours behind AEST, so your afternoon overlaps our morning. Messages get same-day answers, unlike US-based suppliers.

Get Your Australia Landed-Cost Quote

Send your design and quantities - we reply within 24 hours with unit price, shipping and Australian duty & GST included, so you know your exact landed cost.

Get a Free Quote in 24 Hours
